stem: The function f is defined by f(x) = 4x - 1. What is the value of f(3/4)?
rationale: Choice D is correct. Substituting x = 3/4 gives f(3/4) = 4(3/4) - 1 = 3 - 1 = 2. Choice A is the constant term -1 only. Choice B is the result of computing 4(3/4) without subtracting 1. Choice C results from adding 1 instead of subtracting.
